name: testAddCompany
description: Validates successful company creation and correct field persistence.
descriptionHtml: Validates successful company creation and correct field persistence.

steps.name: Navigate to '/' endpoint
Login to the site as 'System admin' with '0909.210533.26.super@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field
Press 'Login' button

testStage.description: Validates successful company creation and correct field persistence.

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' in the Header
Click 'Companies and business units' tab
Click 'Add company' button
Verify: 'Create' button is disabled before filling required fields
Fill company name field
Fill company type field
Fill company description field
Fill company website field
Fill company primary contact field
Fill company email field
Set 'API active' checkbox checked state true
Set 'Portal active' checkbox checked state true
Fill company country field
Fill company state field
Fill company ZIP field
Fill company city field
Fill company phone field
Fill company mobile field
Fill company fax field
Click on the 'Create' button
Close alert message
Click 'Reset filter' button
Select '0909.210533 company name test' company using filter
Verify: selected company is shown in the input field
Verify: name field is correctly filled
Verify: type field is correctly filled
Verify: description field is correctly filled
Verify: website field is correctly filled
Verify: primary contact field is correctly filled
Verify: email field is correctly filled
Verify: 'API active' checkbox is checked
Verify: 'Portal active' checkbox is checked
Verify: phone field is correctly filled
Verify: mobile field is correctly filled
Verify: fax field is correctly filled
Verify: country field is correctly filled
Verify: state field is correctly filled
Verify: ZIP code field is correctly filled
Verify: city field is correctly filled
